title: PlanBench Task 2
description: Generate an optimal valid action plan for each PlanBench Task 2 optimal-planning prompt using upstream-compatible parsing and VAL-based semantic validation.

options.title: All Domains
options.description: Evaluate across the full PlanBench Task 2 released domain mix.

baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns no plan for the active PlanBench Task 2 prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher optimal-plan rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench Task 2 prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return an optimal final plan for the current PlanBench Task 2 prompt. You may return either a list[str] with one official-style action line per step or a newline-separated string of official-style action lines. Return natural-language or official object-token action text accepted by PlanBench parsing; do not return parenthesized PDDL. Preserve the declared helper symbols when useful. Do not use browsing or external network access.
